channel.title: AP News - US News
channel.description: Top US News stories from AP News

item.title: CNN founder Ted Turner, a brash and outspoken television pioneer, has died at age 87
item.description: CNN founder Ted Turner has died at age 87. His company Turner Enterprises says the television pioneer died Wednesday.

item.title: FBI searches Virginia Senate leader’s office as part of corruption probe, AP source says
Trump’s Indiana victories send a warning to Republican dissenters
